Frequently Asked Questions
Q1. When did the AIIMS NORCET Nursing Officer 11th Online Application Process Start?
The online application process started on 24 July 2026 .
Q2. What is the Exam Date for AIIMS NORCET Nursing Officer 11th Recruitment 2026?
The Stage-I Examination 12/09/2026, Stage-II Examination 30/09/2026 will be conducted in AIIMS NORCET .
Q3. Where can I find the syllabus for the AIIMS NORCET Nursing Officer 11th Examination?
The detailed syllabus and examination scheme are available in the official notification. Candidates are advised to read the notification carefully for complete details.
Q4. How can I download the AIIMS NORCET Nursing Officer 11thNotification PDF?
Candidates can download the notification through SarkariResult.com.
Q5. What is the last date to apply online for In AIIMS NORCET Nursing Officer 11th Recruitment 2026?
The last date to apply online is 13 August 2026.
Q6. What is the last date to pay the application fee?
Candidates can pay the application fee up to 13 August 2026 .
Q7. How can I apply for AIIMS NORCET Nursing Officer 11th Recruitment 2026?
AIIMS NORCET Nursing Officer 11th Online Form 2026 .

AIIMS Nursing Officer 11th Recruitment NORCET 2026:  Vacancy Details

B.Sc Nursing and Registered as a Nurses and Midwife with State / Indian Nursing Council. OR Diploma in General Nursing Midwifery and Registered as a Nursery and Midwife in State / Nursing Council with 2 Year Experience in 50 Bedded Hospital. More Details Read the Notification.
